title: hieracium tridentatum subsp. lotharingum
intro: Hieracium tridentatum subsp. lotharingum, commonly known as hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to Europe and other parts of the world. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium tridentatum subsp. lotharingum include its ability to stimulate the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, or by using the dried plant material to make a tea, though it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
